boat.construction_details: Iroko planking on iroko frames and oak longitudinals.
boat.full_description:
'Waterwitch' design by Maurice Griffiths, single hard chine with central ballast keel and bilge keels.  
Carvel iroko on iroko and oak frames and longitudinals.  
Length on deck 30ft (9.1m),  Length over all 37ft 9in  (11.8m),  
Beam 8ft 6in (2.6m)  Draught 3ft 3in  (1.0m)
Displacement in cruising trim about 7.0 tons.  TM  8 tons
Gaff cutter rig with alloy spars.
4 berths
Petter PH2 WMGR auxiliary engine, 15bhp @ 1800 rpm.
boat.name: St. Bede
